product_type: Slab Requirements and New Slab Recommendations

reinforcement.pattern: Grid pattern with long and short bars

anchors.spacing_from_seams: 6" minimum for 3/4" anchors, 7.5" minimum for 1" anchors
anchors.dowels: #4 x 18" long anchorage dowels spaced every 18" around perimeter

installation_requirements.foundation: Allowable bearing capacity not less than 2,000 lb/sq ft
key_requirements: Must be installed on concrete only
Continuous single slab required for 2-post lifts
No installation on expansion seams or cracked concrete
Floor must be properly aged to ACI specifications

notes: All 2-post lifts require continuous single slab
DO NOT install on secondary floor without written authorization
Core sample testing recommended to verify floor properties
Larger 4' x 4' base pads available for floors with thickness less than 6"
Consult building architect for seismic zone installations

pages_summary.description: Title page with company contact information
pages_summary.extracted_text: MOHAWK PRE-EXISTING SLAB REQUIREMENTS & NEW SLAB RECOMMENDATIONS MOHAWK RESOURCES LTD. 65 VROOMAN AVE. AMSTERDAM, NY 12010 TOLL FREE: 1-800-833-2006 LOCAL: 1-518-842-1431 FAX: 1-518-842-1289 INTERNET: www.MOHAWKLIFTS.com E-MAIL: Service@MOHAWKLIFTS.com

pages_summary.description: Pre-existing minimum floor requirements table with lift models A-7 through TR-75
pages_summary.extracted_text: Mohawk Resources Ltd. PRE-EXISTING Minimum Floor Requirements - Table showing Mohawk Lift Models (A-7, System IA, System IA-10, LC-12, LMF-12, TP-15, TP-16, TP-18, TP-20, TP-20-WB, TP-26, TP-26-WB, TP-30, TP-30-WB, TR-19, FL-25, TR-25A, TR-30, TR-33, TR-35, TR-50, TR-75) with Minimum Slab Thickness (4-1/2" to 12"), Minimum Compressive Strength (4000 psi with 28 day aging), Reinforcement Size (#6 rebar or ACI Temp only), and Reinforcement Spacing (10 in. to 12 in.)

pages_summary.description: New slab recommendations with basic concrete requirements
pages_summary.extracted_text: New Slab Recommendations: Basic Concrete Requirements: Minimum Tensile Strength of Concrete: 4,000 P.S.I. Minimum Aging of New Concrete Slab: 28 days (cure time) Minimum Thickness of Concrete Slab: See New Slab Table & Figure Attached Minimum Width and Length of Slab: See New Slab Table & Figure Attached - All properties mandatory - New slab must be totally surrounded by existing concrete floor - Care should be taken to locate reinforcement bars away from anchor positions - All 3/4 inch diameter anchors must be minimum 6 inches away from expansion seams - All 1 inch diameter anchors must be minimum 7 1/2 inches away from expansion seams - NEVER, NEVER hand mix your own concrete

pages_summary.description: Detailed new slab recommendations table with dimensions for all lift models
pages_summary.extracted_text: New Slab Recommendations NEW SLABS MUST BE 12" THICK MINIMUM - Table showing Lift Models with W Slab Width, L Slab Length, R Reinforcement Size, S1 & S2 Reinforcement Spacing, D Wej-it Dia, I Wej-it Length for models A-7 through TR-75 with specific dimensions and requirements including Four Separate Slabs Formed at each Post for TR models

pages_summary.description: Technical drawing showing new recommended slab design for 2-post lifts
pages_summary.extracted_text: NEW RECOMMENDED SLAB DESIGN FOR 2-POST LIFTS FILE: MAN066 DATE: 2/98 REV DATE: 7/2003 - Shows plan view and Section A-A with reinforcement details, anchor specifications, and dimensional callouts including 12" slab thickness, reinforcement pattern, and anchor placement

pages_summary.description: Technical drawing showing new recommended slab design for 4-post lifts
